data.title: FPL reaches agreement in principle to keep customer bills below national average for four years.
data.description: In Juno Beach, Florida, on August 8, 2025, Florida Power & Light Company announced an agreement with major stakeholder groups on a four-year rate settlement. This agreement aims to maintain customer bills significantly below the national average until the end of the decade. FPL and the stakeholders have reached a consensus on a comprehensive plan that will impact rates for the next four years to ensure affordability for customers.

data.title: Edesa Biotech reports Q3 2025 results, focusing on developing therapeutics for immuno-inflammatory diseases.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Edesa Biotech, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker EDSA, based in Toronto, announced its financial performance for the three and nine months concluding on June 30, 2025. Specializing in host-directed therapeutics for immuno-inflammatory conditions, the company shared details on its recent business activities.

data.title: International Tower Hill Mines filed 2025 Q2 financial results | Numbers: TSX: ITH, NYSE American: THM | August 8, 2025
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on August 8, 2025, International Tower Hill Mines Ltd. revealed the submission of its unaudited second-quarter Financial Statements along with the Management Discussion and Analysis and Quarterly Report. The company operates under the tickers TSX: ITH and NYSE American: THM.

data.title: Spirit AeroSystems to sell Subang, Malaysia facility to CTRM for $95.2 million. Deal announced on Aug 8, 2025.
data.description: In Wichita, Kansas on August 8, 2025, Spirit AeroSystems Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SPR) disclosed a deal to offload its operations in Subang, Malaysia to Composites Technology Research Malaysia Sdn Bhd ("CTRM") for $95.2 million. The agreement is subject to standard conditions and procedures.

data.title: LibertyStream closes $3,530,000 promissory note financing with Pathfinder Asset Management Ltd.
data.description: LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners Inc. has successfully completed its offering of 12% promissory notes, raising a total of $3,530,000 in gross proceeds. Pathfinder Asset Management Ltd. acquired $3,400,000 worth of the Notes, which are senior and secured against all assets. The Company's ticker symbols are TSXV: LIB, OTCQB: VLTLF, and FSE: I2D.
Trump: The Russia-Ukraine war could be settled very soon.

data.title: Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. (NYSE American: CVR) reveals Q2 2025 results; detailed summary available.
data.description: Warrenville-based company, Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. (NYSE American: CVR), shared their financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2025. During this period, the company reported its consolidated results for the three and six months ending on June 30, 2025. The specific numbers and details of their performance were unveiled in the recent announcement.

data.title: eHealth, Inc. (Nasdaq: EHTH) announces inducement grants under Nasdaq rule, Aug 8, 2025, in Austin, TX.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on August 8, 2025, eHealth, Inc. (Nasdaq: EHTH), a prominent online health insurance marketplace, revealed that on August 4, 2025, in accordance with the terms disclosed on July 29, 2025, the Company took significant steps.

data.title: CNL Strategic Capital reports Q2 2025 results, aiming for income & growth by acquiring equity.
data.description: Orlando, Florida-based CNL Strategic Capital, LLC aims to offer investors current income and long-term growth by obtaining controlling equity interests along with loan positions in privately held middle-market companies. The firm has revealed its operational performance for the first half of 2025, covering the period until June 30.

data.title: Faraday Future to hold special meeting to execute second part of Bridge Strategy efficiently and responsibly.
data.description: Faraday Future has disclosed plans for an upcoming special meeting aimed at facilitating swift implementation of the second phase of the Bridge Strategy. The company is focusing on ensuring prudent issuance of resources to support this strategy.

data.title: Paul Mueller Company (OTC: MUEL) declares a quarterly cash dividend of 30 cents per share on August 8, 2025. Payable Sept 26.
data.description: Paul Mueller Company, based in Springfield, Missouri, recently declared a cash dividend of 30 cents per share on its common stock (OTC: MUEL). This decision was made during a regular Board of Directors meeting on August 8, 2025. Shareholders of record on August 26, 2025, will receive the dividend on September 26, 2025. This dividend amounts to a total payment of $0.30 per outstanding share.

data.title: Fulcrum Therapeutics issues stock options under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) to new employees, aiming to boost staff retention.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc. in Cambridge, revealed that they have given non-statutory stock options to fresh recruits. These options allow the purchase of company common stock as per the 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan. The move was deemed crucial under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Fulcrum, a biopharmaceutical company in the clinical stage, specializes in creating small molecules to enhance the quality of life for individuals with rare genetic illnesses. Traded under Nasdaq as FULC, the company's focus remains on developing therapies for these conditions.

data.title: Alamos Gold filed base shelf prospectus with OSC for issuance of up to US$500,000,000 of Securities, effective for 25 months.
data.description: Alamos Gold Inc. has filed a base shelf prospectus with the Ontario Securities Commission and a corresponding shelf registration statement with the SEC, allowing the issuance of up to US$500,000,000 of Securities. This includes Class A common shares, debt securities, warrants, and subscription receipts. The Base Shelf Prospectus is effective for 25 months and allows offerings in all Canadian provinces and territories, while the Registration Statement enables offers and sales in the US. The Registration Statement will be effective for the duration of the Base Shelf Prospectus once declared so by the SEC.

data.title: Jeff Harsh, named COO of Advantage Solutions Branded Services. Successor to Dean General. Harsh, former leader in CPG, to drive segment growth.
data.description: Experienced leader with a strong track record in Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) industry and established connections in retail will replace Dean General. Dean General will stay at Advantage in a newly formed position.

data.title: Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. (NYSE American: CVR) posted their Q2 2025 results including Three and Six Months ended June 30.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in Warrenville, Illinois, Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. (NYSE American: CVR) disclosed its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. In the three-month period ending on June 30, 2025, the company reported revenue and net income figures. Additionally, the financial results for the first six months of 2025 were also provided. For detailed information, the full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cryptocurrency prices skyrocket with Bitcoin at $116,439.73, Ethereum at $4,051.48, XRP at $3.29. Market driven by institutional interest. Information about large transactions volume, active addresses. 106,668 traders were liquidated in past 24 hours for $332.89 million. Some notable gainers/losers: Aerodrome Finance, Pendle, Lido DAO.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are experiencing a surge in trading activity, fueled by strong interest from both institutional and retail investors, buoyed by positive regulatory changes. The current prices for some major cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) at $116,439.73, Ethereum (ETH) at $4,051.48, Solana (SOL) at $177.78, XRP at $3.29, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.2277, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001321. Recent data indicates that large transactions for Bitcoin decreased by 2.4%, while Ethereum saw a 15.7% increase in a single day. Daily active addresses for Bitcoin decreased by 1.7%, while Ethereum's increased by 1.3%. Additionally, CoinGlass reported that 106,668 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, resulting in a total of $332.89 million. The top performers in terms of gains and losses within the same period include Aerodrome Finance (AERO), Pendle (PENDLE), and Lido DAO (LDO). Exciting developments in the blockchain sector are also unfolding. For the complete story, visit a trusted financial news platform.

data.title: Weyerhaeuser Company declares $0.21 quarterly dividend per share on common stock, payable on Sep 12, to holders of record.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) declared a quarterly base cash dividend of $0.21 per share on its common stock. This dividend will be paid in cash on September 12, 2025, to holders of record as of that date.
